title: syslog一日之內幾十GB, Nautilus: Please input a valid number

replies.msg:
今日用用下linux 發現個drive 無啦啦唔見咗幾十GB, 即刻開個disk analyzer 出嚟睇

乜都睇唔到, 唯有出動最強大既武器terminal
$ ls -lhS
total 44G
-rw-r-----  1 syslog            adm              34G Jul 12 00:00 syslog.1
-rw-r-----  1 syslog            adm              11G Jul 12 21:40 syslog
-rw-r--r--  1 root              root            1.2M Jun 30 23:46 dpkg.log.1
...

既然用得linux, 就即係又要做debug 師, 經過一番google, 搵到條靈丹妙script, 即刻copy 嚟用
$ for log in /var/log/syslog; do
> echo "${log} :"
> sed -e 's/\[[^]]\+\]//' -e 's/.*[0-9]\{2\}:[0-9]\{2\}:[0-9]\{2\}//' ${log} \
> | sort | uniq -c | sort -hr | head -10
> done
/var/log/syslog :
112630481  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: Please input a valid number
18581249  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: lease input a valid number P
3962463  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: lease input a valid number
1582030  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: Please input a valid number Please input a valid number
360417  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: lease input a valid number Please input a valid number
251216  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number
105873  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: lease input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number
69801  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number
60935  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: message repeated 2 times: [ Please input a valid number]
25279  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: lease input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number

$ for log in /var/log/syslog.1; do 
>   echo "${log} :"
>   sed -e 's/\[[^]]\+\]//' -e 's/.*[0-9]\{2\}:[0-9]\{2\}:[0-9]\{2\}//' ${log} \
>   | sort | uniq -c | sort -hr | head -10
> done
/var/log/syslog.1 :
366716327  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: Please input a valid number
56010889  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: lease input a valid number P
11515431  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: lease input a valid number
4656313  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: Please input a valid number Please input a valid number
1080264  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: lease input a valid number Please input a valid number
743061  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number
286086  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: lease input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number
186940  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number
92633  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: message repeated 2 times: [ Please input a valid number]
68139  pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus: lease input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number

搵到罪魁禍首就係Nautilus, 出咗成幾億行log
案發時間就係琴日夜晚11點到12點20分
$ grep -m 1 "valid number" syslog.1
Jul 11 22:59:54 pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus[24899]: Which one would you like to use? [0-1] Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number Please input a valid number ... 

$ tail -n 20000 syslog | grep "valid number" | tail -n 1
Jul 12 00:19:17 pop-os org.gnome.Nautilus[24995]: Please input a valid number

唔識點樣由尾grep 第一行, 唯有咁樣勁on9 咁pipe


基本上去到呢度我已經技窮, google 完全搵唔到related 既野, 我又唔記得琴晚做過啲咩嚟
有無人會知咩事可以指點下迷津?

replies.msg: 多謝提醒，我以後都唔會裝nautilus

都要解決點解會有幾億行 syslog
Please 有 d 冇左 P ?
